audit.task:
Act as the AGI-model CI audit oracle. Review the VAE smoke contract, the VAE loss interpretation, and the phi artifact analysis. Return JSON with keys: status, notes, blocking_issues, suggested_next_step, confidence, cited_artifacts. Status must be one of ok, review, fail.

VAE smoke summary:
{
  "passed": true,
  "total_loss": 20.497904,
  "reconstruction_mae": 0.52371,
  "loss_kl": 0.195278,
  "loss_hamming": 66.625,
  "loss_mixed_state": 0.989756,
  "checks": [
    {
      "name": "reconstruction_shape",
      "passed": true,
      "detail": "got [8, 128]"
    },
    {
      "name": "mu_shape",
      "passed": true,
      "detail": "got [8, 32]"
    },
    {
      "name": "log_var_shape",
      "passed": true,
      "detail": "got [8, 32]"
    },
    {
      "name": "finite_losses",
      "passed": true,
      "detail": "all reported loss components must be finite"
    },
    {
      "name": "finite_metrics",
      "passed": true,
      "detail": "core metrics must be finite"
    }
  ]
}

VAE interpretation summary:
{
  "contract_path": "D:\\AGI-GH-REPO-11326\\AGI-model\\vae_smoke_checkpoint.json",
  "total_loss": 20.497904,
  "reconstruction_mae": 0.52371,
  "loss_kl": 0.195278,
  "loss_hamming": 66.625,
  "loss_mixed_state": 0.989756,
  "final_stage_output": {
    "stage": "Visual",
    "input_stage": "Validator",
    "format": "metric-readout",
    "visual": "KL: 0.195 (Healthy)  Hamming: 66.6 (High error)  Mixed-state: 0.99 (Near decoherence)  Tighten latent prior variance",
    "summary": "Latent encoding is regularized but quantum-state fidelity suffers; increase KL coefficient to suppress variance and improve coherence."
  }
}

Phi analysis summary:
{
  "artifact_path": "D:\\AGI-GH-REPO-11326\\AGI-model\\artifacts\\ibm_decoherence_job_analysis.json",
  "artifact_type": "ibm-decoherence-analysis",
  "phi_value": null,
  "phi_alignment_score": null,
  "consciousness_level": null,
  "integrated_information": null,
  "ghz_mass_delta_control_to_moderate": 0.018128,
  "entropy_delta_control_to_moderate": -0.121258,
  "backend_gap_marrakesh_minus_fez": 0.149699,
  "final_stage_output": {
    "stage": "Visual",
    "input_stage": "Validator",
    "format": "status-card",
    "visual": "Collapse kinetics: weak GHZ mass  + entropy  | Backend variance dominates | Next: X-basis coherence tomography required",
    "summary": "Phase-only kicks induce no observable decoherence in Z-basis; X-basis tomography must be added to resolve phase disruption."
  }
}

stages.raw_output:
{
  "status": "review",
  "notes": "Smoke tests pass but loss components indicate latent representation issues: high Hamming loss and near-decoherence mixed-state suggest insufficient KL regularization. Phi analysis confirms lack of X-basis coherence data to diagnose phase disruption.",
  "blocking_issues": [
    "Loss_hamming (66.625) indicates severe reconstruction error in symbolic or binary outputs",
    "loss_mixed_state (0.99) implies quantum state near decoherence; violates fidelity target",
    "Phi analysis shows backend variance dominates and GHZ mass delta is small, limiting decoherence observability without X-basis tomography"
  ],
  "suggested_next_step": "Re-run VAE with doubled KL coefficient, validate with X-basis coherence tomography, and recompute Hamming and mixed-state losses.",
  "confidence": 0.87,
  "cited_artifacts": [
    "VAE smoke contract (VAE smoke summary)",
    "VAE loss interpretation (contract_path)",
    "Phi artifact analysis (artifact_path)"
  ]
}
